title: Lightbot
author: Lightbot Inc.
description: Guide a robot to light up tiles using programming commands. Learn sequencing, loops, and problem solving!

title: Memory Match
author: NeuroQuest
description: Flip cards to find matching pairs! Test your visual memory with animals, food, space, and science themes. Three difficulty levels!

title: Math Runner
author: NeuroQuest
description: Solve math problems under pressure! Earn streak bonuses for consecutive correct answers. Questions get harder as you level up.

title: Word Search
author: NeuroQuest
description: Find hidden words in the grid! Choose from Science, Math, Space, Nature, or Human Body topics. Words hide in all directions!

title: Typing Hero
author: NeuroQuest
description: Type falling words before they reach the bottom! Build combos for multiplier bonuses. Track your WPM as you improve!

title: Antura and the Letters
author: Video Games Without Borders
description: Award-winning Arabic literacy game. Help Antura the dog learn letters through 30+ mini-games. Open-source and used by UNHCR.

title: GCompris
author: GCompris Team (KDE)
description: 180+ educational activities covering math, science, reading, puzzles, art, and music. One of the best open-source educational suites.

title: Coding Blocks
author: NeuroQuest
description: Visual block-based coding puzzles. Drag and drop code blocks to solve challenges, like Scratch but built for learning!

title: Virtual Science Lab
author: NeuroQuest
description: Mix chemicals, build circuits, and simulate physics experiments in a safe virtual laboratory!

title: Geography Quest
author: NeuroQuest
description: Explore the world! Identify countries, capitals, and landmarks on an interactive map. Race against the clock!

title: Spelling Bee
author: NeuroQuest
description: Listen to words and spell them correctly! Progressive difficulty with audio pronunciations and definitions.

title: Story Creator
author: NeuroQuest
description: Write interactive stories with branching paths! Choose characters, settings, and plot twists to create your own adventures.

title: Puzzle World
author: NeuroQuest
description: Collection of brain-teasing puzzles: tangrams, sliding puzzles, pattern matching, and logic grids!

title: Color Match
author: NeuroQuest
description: A fast-paced color and shape matching game! React quickly to match patterns on screen.

title: Shape Sorter
author: NeuroQuest
description: Sort shapes by color, size, and type! Drag and drop shapes into the correct bins. Great for young learners.

title: Phonics Fun
author: NeuroQuest
description: Learn letter sounds through interactive games! Match sounds to letters, build simple words, and practice blending.

title: BattleMath Arena
author: Open Source
description: Defeat math monsters by solving equations! RPG-style battles where your weapon is your brain. Boss fights included!

title: Minetest Education
author: Minetest Devs
description: Open-source voxel sandbox like Minecraft! Build, explore, and learn in an unlimited creative world.

title: Khan Academy Activities
author: Khan Academy
description: Interactive math exercises from Khan Academy. Practice arithmetic, algebra, geometry, and more with instant feedback.

title: Antura Lite Demo
author: Video Games Without Borders
description: Demo version of Antura and the Letters. Try a selection of mini-games for Arabic letter learning.
